instructions: Work order for an LLM agent. These are not only errors — they include maintenance, service, data, signal, research, automation, and governance requests. Each item carries a category, severity, suggested_action, and the relevant artifact paths. Resolve actionable (warning+) items using the referenced project files as the source of truth; info/advisory items are optional. The project's Python engine is authoritative for all strategy logic.
